name: Yosenju Kodam
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>木魅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コダマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Yosen Training Grounds" you control; place 3 Yosen Counters on it. You can only use this effect of "Yosenju Kodam" once per turn. You can banish this card from your Graveyard; you can Normal Summon 1 "Yosenju" monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Yosen Training Grounds" you control; place 3 Yosen Counters on it. You can only use this effect of "Yosenju Kodam" once per turn. You can banish this card from your Graveyard; you can Normal Summon 1 "Yosenju" monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Yosen Training Grounds" you control; place 3 Yosen Counters on it. You can only use this effect of "Yosenju Kodam" once per turn. You can banish this card from your Graveyard; you can Normal Summon 1 "Yosenju" monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
